name: ADATA Premier 32GB (1x32GB) DDR5 5600MHz U-DIMM Desktop Ram
highlights: Built-in Power Management IC, more Energy-Efficient
Works with the latest AMD and Intel platforms
description: ADATA Premier 32GB (1x32GB) DDR5 5600MHz U-DIMM Desktop Ram Price in Pakistan Higher Frequencies The DDR5-5600 U-DIMM delivers blazing frequencies of up to 5600 MHz, a major leap from the max. frequency of DDR4 modules (3200 MHz). More Energy-Efficient This next-gen memory module operates on just 1.1V, making it 8% more power-efficient than DDR4.
